case_scope: Slice 1 skeleton. Frozen-design scope: same geometry and fluid conditions as Case 01, with the full envelope of TASK-018 Slice A / B / C outputs: CostModelSelector + CostCalculator + LifeCycleEnergyEstimator. Must preserve TASK-018 Option A boundary (per frozen design §5): discounted_total_minor_units is null; salvage_minor_units is 0 placeholder; no real discount / salvage formula implementation in Slice 1 (those live in a separate TASK-018 design-amendment round). Pressure drop is explicitly NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ scope; excluded from TASK-019 by frozen design §6).
case_title: Double-pipe heat balance + C0/C1 cost + life-cycle envelope

expected_output.case_01_outputs: TBD-by-Slice-2 (reference to Case 01 expected output block)

cost_components_C0_C1.minor_unit_note: integer minor units ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)

expected_output.discounted_total_minor_units_note: null per TASK-018 Option A. Real discount formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3 design-amendment round. No real discount formula in Slice 1.

life_cycle_energy_envelope.blocker_codes: TBD-by-Slice-2 (may include unspecified_blocker for Option A deferred amendments)

expected_output.salvage_minor_units_note: 0 placeholder per TASK-018 §5.3.2 schema (integer minor units; no default). Real salvage formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3.2 design-amendment round.

selected_cost_model.selection_blockers: TBD-by-Slice-2 (may be non-empty per TASK-018 Option A behavior)

unspecified_blocker.note: Slice 1 observes TASK-018 Option A boundary: when the upstream chain reports the discount-formula deferred-amendment signal, this field carries the matching reason. No discount formula is implemented in Slice 1.

slice1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 fixture-shape reproducibility only. TASK-018 Option A boundary preserved (discounted_total_minor_units = null; salvage_minor_units = 0). Real TASK-018 discount / salvage formulas deferred to a future TASK-018 design-amendment round; not implemented in TASK-019 Slice 1.
